clues: IoT sensor devices are reporting data intermittently to the central monitoring system.
The monitoring dashboard shows frequent gaps in sensor readings.
The sensors are powered on and their local status indicators show normal operation.
The MQTT broker log shows repeated client disconnection and reconnection events.
The MQTT broker's keep-alive timeout setting is too short for the network latency.
